{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heaven's Glory School token
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Heaven's Glory School token]] is made of polished [[orus wood]] and bears the school's mark: three crossed swords on top of a blazing sun with clouds.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13">''Unsouled'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
